title: lithocarpus nhatrangensis
intro: Lithocarpus nhatrangensis, also known as the Vietnamese copper beech, is a species of evergreen tree native to Vietnam. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus nhatrangensis include potential treatments for fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Lithocarpus nhatrangensis is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
